title: Dullabha Sutta
subtitle: Hard to Find
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
contentHtml: "Monks, these two people are hard to find in the world. Which two? The one who is first to do a kindness, and the one who is grateful for a kindness done and feels obligated to repay it. These two people are hard to find in the world."
summary: A grateful person is hard to find.
